nasb.text: The border of the sons of Reuben was the Jordan. This was the inheritance of the sons of Reuben according to their families, the cities and their villages.

esv.text: And the border of the people of Reuben was the Jordan as a boundary. This was the inheritance of the people of Reuben, according to their clans with their cities and villages.

cnv.text: 流本人領土的疆界是約旦河，這就是流本人按著家族得著的產業所包括的眾城，和屬於這些城的村莊。

ccb.text: 吕便支派的土地以约旦河为界。以上是吕便支派按宗族分到的城邑和村庄。
